nodes.name: Mock Save Feedback
nodes.notes: MOCK of POST /api/v1/content_feedback. At go-live: HTTP POST body { slot_id, variant_id, reviewer_id, body: feedback }.

nodes.name: Call WF-CAPTION
nodes.notes: Calls WF-CAPTION with the ENHANCED brief (post-feedback). Requires WF-CAPTION published. Returns a fresh caption shaped to the reviewer's direction.

nodes.name: Mock Save New Variant
nodes.notes: MOCK of POST /api/v1/content_variants (new row, version+1, replacing the rejected one). At go-live: HTTP POST.

nodes.name: Mock Mark Slot pending_review
nodes.notes: MOCK of PATCH /v1/content/slots/{slot_id} status=pending_review. The slot goes BACK to review with the new variant. Reviewer sees the updated content and approves or rejects again.

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: {
  success: true,
  slot_id: d.slot_id,
  platform: d.platform,
  variant_id: d.variant_id,
  version: d.version,
  new_caption: d.caption,
  new_hashtags: d.hashtags,
  new_char_count: d.char_count,
  feedback_addressed: d.feedback_addressed,
  tone_shift: d.tone_shift,
  analysis_summary: d.analysis_summary,
  slot_status: d.slot_status
}}];
